underlying_filing_type.description: Enum identifying which underlying entity-action filing this Certificate of Limited Liability Partnership accompanies. Values: 'articles_of_entity_conversion' (13-C MRSA §955.1), 'merger_or_share_exchange' (13-C MRSA §1106 / 31 MRSA §744 / §1436), 'inter_entity_consolidation' (31 MRSA §744), 'articles_of_conversion' (31 MRSA §746 / §1432), 'conversion_of_partnership' (31 MRSA §1093). Exactly one is selected per filing — the 5 page-0 checkboxes are mutually exclusive radio options. New canonical key for the '-1' accompaniment-form pattern; analogous future forms (e.g., LP_MLPA-12-1, LLP_MLLP-12-1) may carry different underlying-filing-type enums.
